purpose: Privacy-safe, machine-readable governance for future AI/Codex agents to propose WellFit personalization and product improvements from aggregated user feedback, gameplay behavior, and engagement signals without exposing raw user data or activating live tracking.

allowedAggregateSignals.description: Percentage of missions completed per existing module or route group after aggregation.
Percentage of started missions abandoned per existing module or route group after aggregation.
Count buckets for repeated use or favorites at module level only.
Difficulty buckets such as too_easy, balanced, too_hard from reviewed and aggregated feedback.
Satisfaction buckets by route or module without raw messages.
Reviewed feature-request themes clustered without personal text.
Positive, neutral, negative, mixed, unknown counts for a route/module/time window.
Counts for safe buddy interaction categories such as encouragement, quiz_help, mission_hint, celebration.
Aggregated friction categories such as too_hard, too_long, unclear, technical_issue, privacy_concern, low_motivation.
Broad device class only, such as mobile, tablet, desktop; no IDs, fingerprints, OS builds, or exact models.
Broad preference windows such as morning, afternoon, evening, weekend; no exact routines.
Explicitly non-sensitive labels derived from non-sensitive behavior, such as explorer, quiz_focused, movement_focused, social_helper.

forbiddenRawSensitiveFields: raw user messages unless manually reviewed and redacted
IP addresses, session IDs, advertising IDs or device fingerprints
exact location, GPS coordinates, addresses, route history or location traces
health data, wearable raw streams, heart rate, sleep, weight, injuries, symptoms, diagnoses or medications
child/minor data, school/class identifiers, guardian contact details or exact age for minors
camera images, video, audio, AR captures, face data, biometric data, raw sensor data or biometric templates
medical claims, diagnosis suggestions or treatment recommendations
payment data, token data, NFT data, wallet data, payout data, staking, presale, trading or betting data
mission-completion evidence, anti-cheat evidence, final reward authority or ledger decisions
exact daily routine that could identify a person
secrets, API keys, auth tokens or private support notes
missionAdaptationRules: Recommend easier missions when aggregated abandon and too_hard buckets exceed threshold; do not shame or pressure users.
Recommend shorter missions when aggregated too_long feedback exceeds threshold.
Recommend clearer instructions when unclear friction exceeds threshold.
Recommend alternate non-camera, non-location paths when privacy concern buckets appear.
Use existing mission modules and registers; do not create duplicate mission architecture.
Do not directly change mission completion, anti-cheat, reward authorization or ledger authority.
buddyAdaptationRules: Recommend buddy tone changes only from safe aggregate preferences and satisfaction buckets.
Allowed tone suggestions are calm, funny, coach, explorer and mentor.
Do not use manipulative psychological targeting, sensitive profiling or vulnerability inference.
Do not expose raw user text to buddy prompts unless manually reviewed and redacted.
Escalate safety, child, medical, privacy or crisis-like themes for human review instead of automated buddy behavior.
difficultyTuningRules: Suggest easier, balanced or harder mission variants based on aggregate completion, abandon and difficulty-feedback buckets.
Prefer reversible content/configuration recommendations over runtime logic changes.
Do not penalize low engagement or personalize in a way that creates pressure, shame or unsafe competition.
Flag possible accessibility or technical-friction causes before recommending harder difficulty.
challengeRewardTuningBoundaries: Agents may recommend challenge pacing, explanation, non-financial point-preview wording or internal beta UX improvements.
Agents must not directly alter rewards, XP authority, token/economy, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, staking, payout, marketplace or final ledger behavior.
Any high or critical reward, economy, anti-cheat, mission-completion or fairness change requires human review.
Internal beta points remain preview/planning unless server authority and approved rules explicitly exist elsewhere.
fairnessAndSafetyRules: Use aggregated buckets only; do not infer protected traits or sensitive conditions.
Avoid personalization that excludes users without a watch, camera, location sharing or high-end device.
Provide fallback recommendations for indoor, non-camera, non-location and short-session users.
Do not pressure, shame, diagnose, treat or make medical claims.
Keep child/minor, health, exact location, camera/biometric, payment/token/wallet and privacy/compliance topics out of agent-visible summaries.
High or critical product changes, safety-sensitive themes and protected-area changes require human approval before implementation.

minimumSampleThresholds.suppressionRule: Do not show a bucket or recommendation to agents when the applicable threshold is not met.

explainabilityRequirements: Every recommendation must cite aggregate signal ids, source register/doc paths and sample threshold status.
Every recommendation must state the personalization dimension affected and the safe boundary that prevents protected logic changes.
Every recommendation must include a plain-language explanation suitable for human review.
Every recommendation must include confidence, risk level and whether human review is required.
No recommendation may rely on raw user identifiers, raw messages, exact location, health, child, camera/biometric, payment/token/wallet or medical data.
humanReviewRequiredTriggers: recommendation touches reward authority, XP authority, mission completion, anti-cheat, ledger, token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, staking or payout boundaries
recommendation touches health, watch, child/minor, exact location, camera, biometric, medical, privacy, consent, legal, AGB, Datenschutz, Impressum or compliance topics
recommendation needs a new runtime tracker, production write, third-party analytics integration or raw data processing
recommendation includes possible safety harm, shame/pressure, manipulative targeting, discrimination or unfair exclusion
minimum sample threshold is not met or a small cohort could become identifiable
raw user messages are needed and have not been manually reviewed and redacted

agentVisibleSummarySchema.summaryId: string; opaque aggregate summary id, never a user id
agentVisibleSummarySchema.moduleOrRouteGroup: existing module or route group only
agentVisibleSummarySchema.sampleSize: number at or above applicable threshold
agentVisibleSummarySchema.aggregateSignals: array of allowed aggregate signal ids with bucketed values only
agentVisibleSummarySchema.frictionCategories: array of controlled aggregate friction categories

recommendationSchema.summaryId: string referencing an agent-visible aggregate summary
recommendationSchema.suggestedChange: plain-language proposal, not an automatic runtime action
recommendationSchema.supportingAggregateSignals: array of allowed aggregate signal ids
recommendationSchema.explanation: plain-language reason using aggregate evidence only
recommendationSchema.forbiddenDataCheck: must state no raw/sensitive fields used
